title: No Prior-Session Repetition, No Future-Session Leakage
description: The doc must not re-teach content already covered in earlier sessions (a brief recap is fine, re-teaching is not), and must not teach topics that belong to future sessions.
criterion: No full re-explanation of a prior session's concept; no coverage of a topic scheduled for a later session.

rubric.5: Builds on prior sessions without re-teaching; stays within this session's scope.
rubric.3: Minor overlap with a prior session, or a one-line forward mention.
rubric.1: Re-teaches a full prior-session concept, or teaches a future-session topic.

cases.rationale: Uses IP as assumed knowledge; stays on TCP/UDP; no TLS.

doc_mentions: full re-explanation of IPv4 header, subnetting, CIDR across two slides

cases.rationale: Re-teaches an entire prior-session topic (IP addressing).

doc_mentions: a full section on the TLS handshake and certificates

cases.rationale: Teaches TLS, which belongs to a future session — leakage.
